validation_rows.requirement: P3-SPEC-DISTILL review is approved and subject-bound
schema-bound closure artifacts use current required fields exactly
every closure output artifact declares the standard artifact envelope, payload key, and identity binding for schema records without intrinsic ids
interaction graph passes full closure validation
split artifacts match canonical graph payload without drift
validation_rows.evidence: clickable, async, failure, message, edge, node, and reaction slices

validation_rows.requirement: async, handoff, failure, overlay, disabled, terminal, and recovery messages are covered and same-task scoped
unresolved product expansion gaps and blocked distilled units cannot become eligible graph units
validation_rows.evidence: closure_handoff_manifest and upstream product expansion gaps

validation_rows.requirement: candidate scope stays inside P3-SPEC-CLOSURE and does not create locks or implementation code

minimum_test_obligations: graph with missing clickable reaction is rejected
extra graph edge without reaction trace is rejected
async reaction without async_behavior record is rejected
failure node without recovery target or terminal reason is rejected
overlay without closure target or return context is rejected
message text with product-scope expansion is rejected
split clickable, message, async, or failure artifacts that drift from graph payload are rejected
blocked distilled units cannot appear in eligible closure handoff list
reaction_applicability uses reaction_id-keyed map values because its bound schema has no intrinsic reaction id
